sections.title: O Come, All Ye Faithful
sections.snippet: O Come all ye faithful, joyful and triumphant. O come ye, O come ye to Bethlehem. Come and behold Him, born the King of Angels
sections.author: ADESTE FIDELES, Arranged by Tom Booth

sections.snippet: Blessed are they, blessed are they who dwell in your house, O Lord.
sections.author: Owen Alstott

sections.snippet: Open our hearts, O Lord, to listen to the Words of Your Son.
sections.author: Sprit & Psalm 2025

sections.title: Child of the Poor/What Child is This
sections.snippet: Helpless and hungry, lowly he lies, wrapped in the chill of midwinter; comes now among us, born into poverty’s embrace, new life for the world.
sections.author: Scott Soper/GREENSLEEVES

sections.snippet: Our God has appeared on the earth, and lived among us.
sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice

sections.title: We Adore
sections.snippet: We adore these tiny hands come down to reach us, come to make the lame to walk, the blind to see. We adore these hands for one day they will free us as they hold the sin-forged nails of Calvary.
sections.author: Sarah Hart and Scott Krippayn

sections.title: Ave Maria
sections.snippet: Ave Maria, gratia plena, Maria, gratia plena, Maria, gratia plena, Ave, Ave, Dominus, Dominus tecum. Benedicta tu in mulieribus, et benedictus, Et benedictus fructus ventris (tui), Ventris tui, Jesus. Ave Maria!
sections.author: Franz Schubert

sections.title: Holy Family
sections.snippet: Oh loving Father, make our home. In Nazareth where you may reign. A holy family of love Where Jesus' manger lays.
sections.author: Danielle Rose

sections.title: Joy to the World
sections.snippet: Joy to the world! the Lord is come; Let earth receive her King; Let ev'ry heart prepare him room, And heav'n and nature sing, And heav'n and nature sing, And heav'n, and heav'n and nature sing.
sections.author: ANTIOCH, Arranged by Dean Baskerville, Laurie Roberts and Tammy McMorrow

sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena

sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena

sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena

sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena

sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
